faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

0.question: How much does a web project cost?
0.answer: Every project is unique. A showcase website starts around $3,000, a custom web application between $10,000 and $50,000+. We provide a free estimate after an initial discussion.

1.question: What are your delivery timelines?
1.answer: A showcase site takes 2 to 4 weeks. A complex application, 2 to 4 months. We work in sprints with visible deliverables every week.

2.question: Do you offer hosting?
2.answer: Yes. We manage hosting, monitoring, and updates on reliable infrastructure (Vercel, IONOS, AWS, or self-hosted).

3.question: How does automation work?
3.answer: We analyze your repetitive processes and transform them into automated workflows with n8n, APIs, and scripts. The result: fewer errors, more time for what matters.

4.question: Do you work with clients outside Quebec?
4.answer: Absolutely. We work remotely with clients across Canada, France, and internationally. Everything is done online, efficiently.

5.question: Can I see examples of your work?
5.answer: Of course! Check out our Projects page to see our recent work, or contact us for a personalized demo.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Mark Systems is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.content: We collect information you provide directly: name, email, phone number, and project details through our contact and brief forms. We also automatically collect technical data (IP address, browser type, pages visited) through analytical cookies.

purposes.title: Use of Data
purposes.content: Your data is used to respond to your inquiries, provide our services, improve our website, and, with your consent, send you relevant marketing communications.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for site functionality and analytical cookies (with your consent) to understand site usage. You can manage your preferences at any time.

thirdParties.title: Third-Party Sharing
thirdParties.content: We never sell your data. We share information only with trusted service providers necessary for our services (hosting, analytics) and in compliance with legal requirements.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your personal data as long as necessary for the purposes described, or as required by law. Project data is kept for the duration of our business relationship.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: In accordance with Quebec's Law 25 and GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete your personal data, and withdraw your consent. Contact us at info@marksystems.ca to exercise these rights.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For any questions about this policy or your personal data, contact us at info@marksystems.ca or +1 (581) 986-4267.

privacy.footerNote: This policy may be updated periodically. We will notify you of any significant changes.
